task_completion.description: The IFC model is loaded into BlenderBIM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender interface is open, displaying a 3D building model in the viewport, and the Outliner panel shows IFC elements indicating the model (fzk_haus) is loaded.

task_completion.description: The camera is positioned to clearly show a door in the 3D viewport.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A door (IfcDoor) is clearly visible and prominent in the main 3D viewport.

task_completion.description: A new BCF project is initialized and a topic is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bonsai BCF panel/window is open in Blender, showing an active BCF project with at least one newly created topic/issue.

task_completion.description: The topic title and assignee are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the BCF topic details, the Title field contains the word 'Clearance' (e.g., 'Door Clearance Issue') and the 'Assigned To' field is exactly 'architect@example.com'.

task_completion.description: A comment is added and the 3D viewport is captured as a viewpoint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The BCF topic shows a text comment added to the issue, and a viewpoint snapshot image thumbnail is attached that visually matches the 3D viewport view of the door.

task_completion.description: The BCF project is exported/saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, Blender file browser, or terminal/file manager window shows the BCF project being saved to or existing exactly at '/home/ga/BIMProjects/coordination_issues.bcfzip'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Blender/Bonsai GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Blender interface, 3D viewport navigation, and BCF panel interactions, rather than just terminal commands or Python scripts executing in the background.

integrity.description: The captured viewpoint is a genuine snapshot of the 3D viewport.
integrity.visual_evidence: The viewpoint thumbnail in the BCF panel must visually match the 3D viewport showing the door, not a blank image, placeholder, or an unrelated picture.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply mock the output file using a script.
integrity.visual_evidence: The progression of screenshots must show the step-by-step creation of the BCF topic within the BIM software before the final .bcfzip file appears in the file system.
